caption: A man and a woman are seated in wooden director-style chairs on a stage with a dark background featuring purple neon light accents. The man, with curly dark hair and a beard, wears a white long-sleeved button-down shirt and dark trousers. The woman has blonde hair tied back and wears a dark t-shirt with the text "WHO'S IN YOUR" visible, alongside a graphic logo. In the first frame, they are both seated, and the woman is gesturing with her hands while looking toward the man. In the subsequent frames, the woman continues to speak and move her hands, shifting her posture slightly, while the man remains relatively still, listening and looking at her with his hands clasped in his lap. In front of each chair sits a white, rectangular piece of technical equipment. The scene remains static except for the natural movements of the two individuals during their interaction.
